message:
fix(membrane): track peak severity across cadence boundaries in alpha investing

The AlphaInvestingController previously stored alarm onsets as a boolean
(pending_onsets: [bool; N]). When multiple observation ticks elapsed between
cadence boundaries, only the fact that an onset occurred was recorded; the
actual severity at onset time was discarded. At cadence, the controller then
tested using whatever severity happened to be current at that moment, which
could be lower than the true onset peak -- causing missed detections.

Replace pending_onsets with pending_severity: [u8; N] that records the
maximum severity observed since the onset. On each tick, if an alarm is
already pending, update the stored severity to max(current, stored). At
cadence, feed the accumulated peak severity into test_alarm rather than the
instantaneous value, ensuring that transient high-severity events are not
attenuated by subsequent lower-severity observations before the next
test opportunity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
